content:
Canada Clean Technology Innovation Grants 2026

Access $1.2B+ in clean technology innovation funding through SDTC, Clean Technology ITCs, and Net Zero Accelerator programs.

🌱 Clean Technology Funding Overview

Canadian clean technology innovators have access to a comprehensive funding ecosystem designed to accelerate the transition to a low-carbon economy.
shortAnswer: Yes — Complete guide to Canadian clean technology innovation grants. Access $1.2B+ funding through SDTC (up to $15M), Clean Technology ITCs, Net Zero Accelerator, and 22+ cleantech programs. Funding available: up to $1.2B+ (with related programs offering $15M).
shortAnswerQuestion: What innovation and technology grants are available in 2026?

faq.question: What is the application deadline for Canada Clean Technology Innovation Grants  | .2B+ CleanTech Funding | SDTC & Net Zero in 2026?
faq.answer: Deadlines typically vary by specific program tier. However, for 2026, many initiatives operate on a rolling intake basis until funds are depleted. Check the official portal for specific cutoffs.

faq.question: How much funding can I get through Canada Clean Technology Innovation Grants  | .2B+ CleanTech Funding | SDTC & Net Zero?
faq.answer: Funding amounts range depending on business size and scope. Top awards can reach $1.

faq.question: Do I have to give up equity for this program?
faq.answer: No. Government grants and subsidies are non-dilutive, meaning you retain 100% ownership of your company.

expertTip.title: Seed Fund Availability
expertTip.content: SDTC (Sustainable Development Technology Canada) offers Seed Funding for earlier stage companies nominated by accelerators. You don't always need to be Series A ready.
